headline: Jim Cramer Considers Federal Realty’s Dividend “Safe”
summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust (NYSE:FRT) was among the stocks Jim Cramer highlighted during Mad Money, as he noted the rotation into defensive sectors. Cramer called it a “terrific shopping center REIT,” as he commented: Next is Federal Realty. You know, I’ve introduced this company to you probably, maybe 18 years ago. That’s the terrific shopping […]
